subcodes.first_line: O thou chosen guest among them that are near! Mirza Ja'far hath written a letter wherein he made mention of that loving friend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ضیف المقربین جناب میرزا جعفر نامه نگاشته و نام ان یار مهربان را ذکر نموده
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @material and spiritual existence; two books
